hypothesis: Integrating an automated molecular-image localization and segmentation module into the single-agent ChemX preprocessing pipeline and routing segmented molecule images to a dedicated image-to-SMILES model (e.g., DECIMER) will increase SMILES extraction recall on ChemX small-molecule datasets to at least 50%, yielding a statistically significant improvement in overall extraction F1 compared to the current single-agent pipeline without image-based structure recognition.
